results.rendered_html:
cakita a. [cak kartarikta]
1 Shaking, trembling (through fear); bhaya˚, sādhvasa˚;  Me. 27. 
2 Frightened, made to tremble, startled; vyādhānusāracakitā hiraṇīva yāsi  Mk. 1. 17 ;  Amaru. 46 ;  Me. 14. 
3 Afraid, timid, apprehensive; cakitavilokitasakaladiśā  Gīt. 2 ; paulastyacakiteśvarāḥ (diśaḥ)  R. 10. 73. 
— taṃ
1 Trembling.
2 Alarm, fear.
— taṃ ind. With fear, in a startled manner, alarmingly, with awe; cakitamupaimi tathāpi pārśvamasya  M. 1. 11 ; sabhayacakitaṃ  Gīt. 5 ;  Śānti. 4. 4.
